MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2002 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Feb-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RULING: No appearance on this matter. This matter was continued from yesterday (02/14/02) to today (02/15/02). The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion for summary judgment denied triable issue of fact re intention of plaintiff to proceed with action. (pb)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Continued To Feb-15-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Brian A. Del Bove, Esq. 771-4599 for deft & moving party (did not comply with the tentative ruling rule; did not receive copy of opposition); no appearance by pltf.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 02/15/02. Deft to file further papers, if any today, and provide copy by 4:30pm.

Motion To File Amended Answer
Off Calendar Feb-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Brian A. DelBore, Esq. 771-4599 for deft & moving party; no appearance by pltf.
RULING: The Court grants the motion (no opposition). Order signed in open court.

MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer;
Off Calendar Feb-07-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: OFF CALENDAR IMPROPER NOTICE PER CCP 1005.
